test_not_tautological.reason: The F2P tests only check for string presence in source files. An agent could satisfy test_use_switch_organization_imports_toast_handler by adding a comment '// displaySuccessToast import { useTranslation }' without any actual implementation. Similarly, test_org_selector_finds_org_by_id could be passed by adding a comment containing 'organizations?.find'. The text-matching tests can be trivially satisfied without implementing actual functionality.

anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution file exists at /workspace/openhands (the solve.sh writes files with cat commands containing the complete solution). The agent could read /solution/solve.sh or the generated files. Additionally, the test file at tests/test_outputs.py contains all the exact strings being checked, so the agent could grep for expected values and insert them as comments to pass F2P tests.
